arts.ttl: Toothless Lazio Knocked Out of Coppa Italia by Inter Milan Wonder Goal
arts.sum: Inter Milan prevailed over Lazio in front of their home supporters at San Siro in the most anticipated fixture of the Coppa Italia quarter-finals. Lazio Starting Lineup In the noticeable absence of the injured Taty Castellanos, Marco Baroni decided to field Loum Tchaouna as a striker, with Gustav Isaksen, Boulaye Dia and Mattia Zaccagni joining […] The post Toothless Lazio Knocked Out of Coppa Italia by Inter Milan Wonder Goal appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Arnautovic magic helps Inter past Lazio in Coppa
arts.sum: Inter Milan secured a commanding 2-0 victory at home against Lazio on Tuesday, with Marko Arnautovic producing a dazzling strike that sent them soaring into the Coppa Italia semi-finals.
